Why Choose Us

An Experience Beyond Ordinary

Every detail at Four Wheels Gardens is crafted to deliver excellence — from our lush botanical gardens to our world-class service and modern amenities.

Free High-Speed WiFi
Stay connected throughout your entire stay with complimentary gigabit WiFi across all areas of the hotel
Lush Garden Views
Wake up to breathtaking panoramas of our manicured botanical gardens from the comfort of your room
Conference Facilities
State-of-the-art meeting rooms and event halls with full AV equipment for business and social gatherings
Restaurant & Bar
Savour curated Kenyan and international cuisine prepared by our award-winning executive chefs
24/7 Reception
Round-the-clock concierge service ensuring every guest has everything they need at any hour
Airport Transfers
Seamless luxury transfers to and from Jomo Kenyatta International Airport with professional drivers
Secure Parking
24-hour monitored and CCTV-secured parking facility for your complete peace of mind
Family Friendly
Dedicated family suites, children's play areas, and warm spaces designed for every generation
Our Property
Built for Comfort,
Designed for You
Modern en-suite rooms with balcony access, warm interiors, and all the amenities you need for a perfect stay in Nairobi.

Experiences

Craft Your Perfect Story

Whether romance, business, family, or adventure — Four Wheels Gardens curates every moment of your stay to create memories that last a lifetime.

Romantic Dinner
Private garden dining under the stars with curated menus and wine pairing
Corporate Retreats
Full-service team building and leadership offsites with premium facilities
Family Suites
Spacious family rooms with garden access, activities, and dedicated kids' areas
Safari Packages
Curated Nairobi National Park and Maasai Mara tour partnerships
Restaurant & Bar

A Culinary Journey

From sunrise breakfast in the gardens to candlelit dinners under the stars — our kitchen celebrates the finest Kenyan and international flavours.

3
Dining Experiences

Our menu is a love letter to Kenya — fresh ingredients, rich spices, and international technique combined with genuine heart.

Garden Breakfast Spread
Full Kenyan & Continental breakfast buffet served on the garden terrace
KES 950
Chef's Nyama Choma Board
Slow-grilled premium cuts with kachumbari, ugali, and garden salad
KES 2,800
Swahili Seafood Platter
Fresh coastal prawns, fish, and calamari with coconut rice and tamarind sauce
KES 3,400
Garden Cocktail Hour
Signature cocktails and mocktails crafted with local Kenyan botanicals
From KES 450

Google Reviews

Absolutely breathtaking gardens and impeccable service. Our anniversary stay was beyond everything we imagined. The staff anticipated every need before we even asked.

AM

Nairobi, Kenya

TripAdvisor

We held our company conference here and it was seamless. The AV setup, catering, and breakout spaces were all top-notch. Will be booking again for our annual retreat without question.

Local Experiences

Explore Nairobi

Four Wheels Gardens is your gateway to everything Nairobi has to offer — from wildlife safaris to cultural experiences and adventure packages.

Nairobi National Park
Game drives minutes away — Nairobi National Park easily accessible from Kitengela
Book Safari →
Cultural Tours
Nairobi Giraffe Centre, Matbronze Wildlife Art, Karen Blixen Museum & city tours
Explore →
Airport Transfers
Reliable, comfortable transfers to and from JKIA with professional drivers
Book Transfer →
Adventure Packages
Maasai Mara migration, Mount Kenya trekking, and Great Rift Valley experiences
View Packages →

Four Wheels Gardens
Hotel & Accommodation · Kitengela, Nairobi

A 5-star sanctuary of comfort and garden elegance in Kitengela, near the Nairobi Giraffe Centre and Matbronze Wildlife Art. Free parking, restaurant, bar & free Wi-Fi.
